revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_explanation%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} This template is for use on [[WP:CATEGORY|category]] pages (in the Category: namespace), producing a [[WP:HATNOTE|hatnote]] describing the category. It takes a single parameter{{Snd}} the category description{{Snd}} producing the hatnote: : ''This [[Help:Categories|category]] is for'' followed by that description. Any spaces surrounding the parameter are removed, and a space is inserted before it. It should be worded so as to make the result a complete English sentence. A [[Full stop|period (full stop)]] will be added to the end if the parameter does not already end with a period. The hatnote is indented and on a new line (technically, in a new [[:en:Span and div|
]]). == Examples == * This code: {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|articles related to [[:en:Foo|Foo]]}} produces: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|articles related to [[:en:Foo|Foo]]}} * This code: {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|articles related to [[:en:Foo|Foo]].}} produces:{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|articles related to [[:en:Foo|Foo]].}} * This code: {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|articles related to [[:en:Foo|Foo]]:}} (undesirably) produces:{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|articles related to [[:en:Foo|Foo]]:}} ==Redirects== * {{Tlx|About cat}} * {{Tlx|Cat about}} * {{Tlx|Category about}} * {{Tlx|Catexp}} * {{Tlx|Cat exp}} * {{Tlx|Category description}} * {{Tlx|Cat description}} ==See also== {{Category hatnote templates}} {{Namespace category}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
